reasoning: Paid CL 70%, BF 20%, IE 10%. At 287 months maturity (very late), paid CL dominates. Methods converge tightly: CL 3054159.61 (100.0%), BF 3054585.45 (+0.01%), IE 3163773.70 (+3.6%).
